story.iWant: interactive bir setup script ile database seçmek
story.soThat: proje initialize ederken PostgreSQL veya MongoDB arasında seçim yapabileyim
story.tasks: - Task 1: Setup script dosyası oluştur ve temel yapı kur (AC: 1, 6) - Task 2: Interactive database selection prompts implement et (AC: 2) - Task 3: Schema dosyası kopyalama logic implement et (AC: 3) - Task 4: .env dosyası generation implement et (AC: 4) - Task 5: Next steps guidance console output (AC: 5) - Task 6: Integration test ve validation (AC: All)

criterion.verification: File exists at scripts/setup.ts and can be executed with ts-node

criterion.description: Script çalıştırıldığında kullanıcıya soruyor: "PostgreSQL or MongoDB?"
criterion.verification: Interactive prompt appears when running npm run setup

criterion.description: Seçime göre ilgili schema dosyasını `prisma/schema.prisma`'ya kopyalıyor (fs.copyFileSync)
criterion.verification: After selection, prisma/schema.prisma exists with correct provider
.env file created with DATABASE_URL placeholder matching selected database

criterion.description: Kullanıcıya next steps gösteriyor (console output: 1. Fill DATABASE_URL, 2. Run prisma generate, 3. Run prisma migrate dev, 4. Run seed)
criterion.verification: Console displays clear numbered next steps after setup completion

doc.title: Epic 1 Technical Specification
doc.snippet: Complete acceptance criteria specifications for interactive database selection script. Includes setup script requirements, user prompts, file operations, and next steps guidance.

doc.title: Epic 1 Technical Specification
doc.section: Workflows and Sequencing - Database Setup Flow
doc.snippet: Database setup flow: 1) npm run setup, 2) Select database, 3) Copy schema, 4) Generate .env, 5) Show next steps. Detailed step-by-step process with error handling.

doc.title: Boilerplate - Epic Breakdown
doc.snippet: User story, acceptance criteria, and technical notes. Setup script uses Node.js inquirer/readline for prompts, fs.copyFileSync for schema copy, and generates .env from template.

doc.title: Architecture - Boilerplate
doc.snippet: Setup script process: Prompts user for PostgreSQL or MongoDB, copies appropriate Prisma schema, generates .env file from template, initializes database, and runs migrations (PostgreSQL only).

doc.title: Architecture - Boilerplate
doc.snippet: Interactive CLI Script approach for database selection. One-time setup, user-friendly, automatic config. Dual Schema Files strategy provides clean separation without conflicts.

doc.title: Story 1.2: Dual Prisma Schema Setup
doc.snippet: Schema files ready at prisma/schema-postgres.prisma and prisma/schema-mongodb.prisma. Both validated with Prisma v6.16.0. Multi-tenancy (domainID), soft-delete (deletedAt), and timestamp patterns implemented.

artifact.reason: Source schema file to be copied when PostgreSQL is selected. Contains all 11 core entities with relational structure.
Source schema file to be copied when MongoDB is selected. Contains all 11 core entities with document-based structure.
Target file for adding "setup" script command. Already has ts-node as devDependency (v10.9.2) required for script execution.
Already contains prisma/schema.prisma entry (from Story 1.2). Will need to ensure .env is also ignored.

module.name: fs
module.usage: File read/write operations (readFileSync, writeFileSync, copyFileSync, existsSync)

constraint.description: TypeScript strict mode must be enforced. Script must compile without errors.
Database selection is ONE-TIME only. Warn user this is permanent choice. Changing requires project re-initialization.
Setup script should copy ENTIRE schema file without modification. Do not alter schema content.
DATABASE_URL format must match provider: postgresql:// for PostgreSQL, mongodb:// for MongoDB.
Clear error messages for edge cases: .env exists (confirm), invalid selection (retry), schema not found (error and exit), permission issues.
Setup script location: scripts/setup.ts. Schema files: prisma/schema-*.prisma. Generated: prisma/schema.prisma (gitignored).

interface.name: Database Selection Prompt
interface.signature: Question: "Select your database: [1] PostgreSQL, [2] MongoDB" → User Input: 1 or 2

tests.standards: Manual testing approach for this story (setup script). Test both PostgreSQL and MongoDB selection paths. Verify file operations, console output, and edge cases. Jest testing framework available but not required for setup scripts (Epic 9 will establish automated testing standards).
tests.locations: - Manual testing: Run script with different inputs - Integration verification: Check generated files and their content - test/ folder structure exists for future automated tests

idea.description: Verify scripts/setup.ts file created and executable with ts-node
idea.approach: Manual: Run `ts-node scripts/setup.ts` and verify no compilation errors
Manual: Run script, verify prompt "PostgreSQL or MongoDB?" displays

idea.description: Verify schema file copied correctly for both database options
idea.approach: Manual: Test PostgreSQL selection → verify prisma/schema.prisma contains "provider = postgresql". Repeat with MongoDB.
Manual: After script run, check .env exists and contains DATABASE_URL with correct format

idea.description: Verify next steps console output displays correctly
idea.approach: Manual: Verify console shows numbered steps (1-5) and MongoDB migration warning

idea.description: Verify setup script added to package.json
idea.approach: Manual: Check package.json scripts section contains "setup": "ts-node scripts/setup.ts"
Manual: Create .env, run script, verify confirmation prompt appears

idea.description: Test edge case: Invalid database selection
idea.approach: Manual: Enter invalid input (e.g., "3" or "invalid"), verify retry prompt
